# **\--Buhraies Interface--**

* # Isekai History

  * Buhraies developed it as the blood they drank mutated their bodies, plus they wanted more power.  
  * This interface, when not using the logograms, which are the guard rails, basically means you’re altering the soul itself.

* # Soul Energy to Spell Conversion

  * Soul Energy conceptualizes a spell using logograms derived from the shared knowledge within the souls of nearby individuals.

* # Interface Shells

  * When casting spells, five rings will appear in the hand holding the spell.   
  * Each tier holds a limited number of Soul Energy tiers.

| Shell Name | \# of Tiers |
| :---- | :---- |
| I (smallest closer to hand) | 2 |
| II | 8 |
| III | 18 |
| IV | 32 |
| V (largest farthest from hand) | 50 |

* # Casting Spells

* ## **Summary**

  * You select the spell, then apply energy into it and release it.  
    * Target: The target of the spell.  
      * No subject indicates a fallback to a person's mindset regarding how Soul Energy should apply itself.  
        * Miscasts will result in an explosion of soul flame in the hands of the caster.  
    * Verb: You need to think about what you want to do with it. Lack of proper concentration will result in a miscast, explosion, or even blowback.

* ## **Step 1- Apply Desired Spell**

  * See Language \> Buhraies Interface Language  
  * Drawn Target Logogram using a sharp object to perforate the skin.  
  * Or just draw two empty squares (must use knife.)  
  * ![][image1]

* ## **Step 2 \- Start Spell**

  * Clench the fingers in the hand where you hold the Spell & Soul Energy.   
  * The Buhraies Shells will appear when you clench your fingers.  
  * ![][image2]

* ## **Step 3 \- Soul Energy Infusion**

  * For the Cast Hand to suck energy, the caster must “eat” with the hand.  
  * Spells are only stable around each Soul Energy tiers, so energy being fused will always infuse to the next tier of energy. Or apply the difference to the next tier if partial charge was applied.  
  * When the person touches the middle and ring fingers, the Buhraies veins in the person’s hand lights up in Soul Flame. When the other hand “eats”, the flames are absorbed.  
  * ![][image3]

* ## **Step 4 \- Apply Soul Energy**

  * Touch the object you wish to apply the soul energy with the palm of your hand and straight your fingers out. (or release your spell as is for ranged attack)  
    * \*For additional range, cook your arm and time it right to add further momentum.  
    * **\*The caster’s body will feel the weight of the spell like firing a gun.**  
  * ![][image4]

# 

# **\--Soul Spectrum--**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * Analysis of the soul. Soul harmony can be found by using this research.  
  * Buhraies used this to breed people to enhance their power selectively.  
* **Interface**

  * ![][image5]

# 

# 

# **\--Cat. Soul--**

# **Soul VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * Alter target’s Soul DNA based on the caster’s desires.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image6]  
* **Tiers**  
  * Increase the soul qualities of the summon according to the power. The % increase is divided by multiple skills.  
  * Only tiers above X resulted in a noticeable effect, and only upon soul reconnection to a new flesh, if it worked.

# **\--Cat. Body--**

# **{BodyPart} VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * Alter the target’s Body DNA based on the caster’s desires.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image7]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects  
    * \*Kg of mass affected  
  * Affected the genetic information. Does not affect the soul and will remain in effect even with Body Heal if the genetic information is not lost.
